'Ndrina Violi.description: The Violi are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Sinopoli, in the plain of Gioia Tauro, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Alvaro clan. The clan has been involved in international drug trafficking and other criminal activities, with members active in Canada and connections to other 'Ndrangheta clans. Recent operations have led to arrests of its affiliates.

descriptions: Alvaro and Violi were allied in the Faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Sinopoli: nasce nel 1945 con l'omicidio di Giuseppe Filleti tra gli Alvaro - Violi -Macrì e i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo

descriptions: Violi supported Alvaro in the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: The Giorgi and Violi were targeted together in an operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio , i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano

descriptions: The Strangio and Violi were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 13 aprile 2016: Operazione Colombiani d'Aspromonte contro i Nirta-Strangio, i Giorgi, i Violi e gli Italiano.

descriptions: The Violi are allied with the Alvaro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati degli Alvaro.

descriptions: Paolo Violi's sons were affiliated with the Luppino 'ndrina in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Nei primi anni 2000, i due figli di Paolo Violi erano affiliati alla 'Ndrina Luppino a Hamilton (Canada)

descriptions: Paolo Violi became a member of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Paolo Violi ... entra a fare parte della famiglia Cotroni.

descriptions: The Violi are part of the Luppino-Violi family through affiliation.
edges.evidence_quote: La famiglia Luppino sarebbe poi diventata nota come famiglia Luppino-Violi.

descriptions: Seinen Shiso Kenkyukai was a sub-faction within Zen'ai Kaigi.
edges.evidence_quote: In April 1961, Kodama formed his own sub-faction within the Zen'ai Kaigi called Seinen Shiso Kenkyukai

'Ndrina Trapasso.description: The Trapasso are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cutro and Steccato di Cutro, Calabria. They are allied with the Mannolo and Grande Aracri clans and have branches in Emilia-Romagna, especially Parma. Involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and infiltration of public contracts and politics. Active from at least the 1970s to present.

descriptions: Anello and Trapasso were targeted together in Operation Via col vento, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso is listed as an ally of Arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Trapasso

descriptions: Grande Aracri was in a faida (conflict) with the Trapasso family.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 3 marzo 2000 ... scoppia una faida tra i Grande Aracri- Nicoscia -Capicchiano e Russelli e gli Arena - Trapasso - Dragone e Megna

descriptions: Mancuso and Trapasso were targeted together in operation Via col vento, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Via col vento" ... presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were co-conspirators in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso and Anello are sodali (allied) in the same criminal operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso is not directly mentioned, but Falcone is targeted alongside Mannolo, Scerbo, and Zoffreo; no direct tie to Trapasso.
edges.evidence_quote: 29 marzo 2021: Operazione Big Bang contro le cosche Mannolo , Scerbo, Zoffreo e Falcone .

descriptions: Trapasso is allied with Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: I Trapasso sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e Steccato di Cutro , alleata dei Mannolo e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Trapasso and Mancuso are sodali (allied) in the same criminal operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso is allied with Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: I Trapasso sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e Steccato di Cutro , alleata dei Mannolo e dei Grande Aracri di Cutro .

descriptions: Trapasso and Paviglianiti are sodali (allied) in the same criminal operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Trapasso is not directly mentioned, but Scerbo is targeted alongside Mannolo, Zoffreo, and Falcone; no direct tie to Trapasso.
edges.evidence_quote: 29 marzo 2021: Operazione Big Bang contro le cosche Mannolo , Scerbo, Zoffreo e Falcone .

descriptions: Trapasso is connected to Tropea-Talarico.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero collegati con la cosca Tropea-Talarico di Cropani Marina .

descriptions: Trapasso and Zoffreo are involved together in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 dicembre 2019 si conclude l'operazione Infectio che porta a 27 provvedimenti contro affiliati dei Trapasso, Mannolo e Zoffreo

descriptions: Charles Martel Group was formed by veterans of the Organisation armée secrète.
edges.evidence_quote: The group was formed by veterans of the Organisation armée secrète, which fought against Algerian independence during the Algerian War.

descriptions: The Leigh and Devine gangs fought each other in the Battle of Kellett Street.
edges.evidence_quote: Later that year, on 8 August, the 'Battle of Kellett Street' was waged between rival gangs affiliated with Leigh and Devine

descriptions: Thomas and De Vita were opposing sides in the Faida di San Ferdinando.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di San Ferdinando, tra i Thomas e i De Vita.

Logan Heights Gang.description: Sureño street gang based in Southeast San Diego, founded in the 1970s from the unification of several Mexican-American car clubs. Composed of five main subsets operating in Barrio Logan, Logan Heights, and Memorial. Engaged in drug trafficking, murder, kidnapping, and human smuggling, with ties to the Tijuana Cartel and Mexican Mafia. Active in multiple U.S. cities and Tijuana, Mexico.

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is allied with 18th Street gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia, Sureños, Tijuana Cartel, 18th Street gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños, Sinaloa Cartel, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, MS-13, Latin Kings

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños, Sinaloa Cartel, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, MS-13, Latin Kings

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of MS-13.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños, Sinaloa Cartel, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, MS-13, Latin Kings

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang has close ties with the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Logan Heights Gang also has close ties to the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of Norteños.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños, Sinaloa Cartel, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, MS-13, Latin Kings

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Norteños, Sinaloa Cartel, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, MS-13, Latin Kings

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is allied with Sureños.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia, Sureños, Tijuana Cartel, 18th Street gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is an ally of Tijuana Cartel, assisting in smuggling and violent operations.
edges.evidence_quote: The Logan Heights Gang has been an ally to the Tijuana Cartel (also known as the Arellano-Félix Organization) over the Tijuana smuggling route to the border city of San Diego, California.

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is listed as a rival of Sinaloa Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Jalisco New Generation Cartel , Los Zetas , Gulf Cartel (since 2021) , La Línea , Juárez Cartel , Los Mazatlecos , Tijuana Cartel , Logan Heights Gang , Barrio Azteca , Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is a rival of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel lists Logan Heights Gang as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: The Sinaloa Cartel lists the Logan Heights Gang as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang assisted Tijuana Cartel in an attack.
edges.evidence_quote: the Arellano-Félix brothers successfully escaping from the location with the assistance of David Barron Corona , a member of the Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is an ally of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is listed as an ally of Tijuana Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Logan Heights Gang

descriptions: Iron Fist MC is a support club of Trust MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the support clubs are Iron Fist MC, Black Claw Kitzingen, Black Fear North.

descriptions: Asano-gumi is a member of the Gosha-kai federation since 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Goda-ikka is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Goda-ikka has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation, the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Asano-gumi , and the Shikoku -based Shinwa-kai .

descriptions: Goda-ikka is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyodo-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Asano-gumi has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Kyodo-kai, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyodo-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Kyodo-kai has been a member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyosei-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Kyosei-kai formed the Gosha-kai federation with other groups since 1996.
edges.evidence_quote: and has formed a new anti-Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai since 1996 with three other Chugoku-based organizations, the Kyodo-kai, the Asano-gumi, the Goda-ikka, and the Shikoku-based Shinwa-kai.

descriptions: Shinwa-kai is a member of the Gosha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 1996, the Shinwa-kai has been a member of an anti- Yamaguchi federation named the Gosha-kai, along with four Chugoku -based organizations, the Kyosei-kai , the Kyodo-kai , the Goda-ikka , and the Asano-gumi .

descriptions: MOD was in dispute with Laotian Posse.
edges.evidence_quote: the M.O.D was involved in a dispute with two other gangs; the Laotian Posse and the Alliance.

descriptions: Black Jackets and United Tribuns are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: United Tribuns , Red Legions Stuttgart , AK81 , X-Team

descriptions: A Hells Angels member was wanted for a shooting that killed a United Tribuns member.
edges.evidence_quote: The previous day, authorities in Saxony had offered a €10,000 reward for information on Matz, who was wanted in relation to a shooting in Leipzig on 25 June 2016 in which a member of the United Tribuns gang was killed and two other men were critically injured.

descriptions: Tribuns Guardians Balkan is a subgroup of United Tribuns in Bosnia.
edges.evidence_quote: In Bosnia there is a subgroup called "Tribuns Guardians Balkan".

descriptions: Ferraro-Gugliotta and Mazzagatti-Polimeni were opposing sides in the Faida di Oppido Mamertina.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Oppido Mamertina : dura sei anni, dal 1992 al 1998 e dopo una tregua riesplode nel 2011, e dovrebbe essersi conclusa nel novembre 2012 con l'operazione Erinni delle forze dell'ordine (novembre 2013). Da una parte sono schierati i Ferraro-Gugliotta e dall'altra i Mazzagatti - Polimeni

descriptions: Porta Nuova clan allied with Black Axe.
edges.evidence_quote: Si scopre quindi un'alleanza tra il clan palermitano e l'organizzazione nigeriana.

descriptions: The Serb Volunteer Guard was founded by members of the Delije Sever hooligan group.
edges.evidence_quote: The SDG was created on 11 October 1990 by twenty members of the Red Star Belgrade football club Ultra group Delije Sever.

Born to Kill (gang).description: Born to Kill was a New York City-based street gang composed of first-generation Vietnamese immigrants, active in the 1980s and early 1990s. Founded by Tho Hoang "David" Thai in 1988, the gang engaged in drug trafficking, counterfeiting, contract killing, extortion, and other crimes. Its peak membership in New York ranged from 75 to 100. The gang was largely dismantled by 1992 following arrests and prosecutions.

descriptions: The American Mafia funded a brothel run by Born to Kill in exchange for a cut of robbery proceeds.
edges.evidence_quote: the brothel was funded mostly by the American mafia , and in exchange, Thai gave the American mafia a cut of the gang's robbery proceeds.

descriptions: Infobox lists Flying Dragons as a rival of Born to Kill.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Shadows , Flying Dragons

descriptions: Born to Kill initially worked as enforcers for the Flying Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Starting out as enforcers for Triads and established Chinese organized crime groups such as Flying Dragons

descriptions: Born to Kill had a violent conflict with Ghost Shadows over turf.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was also once embroiled in a violent conflict with the Chinese Ghost Shadows over turf of the lucrative activities.

descriptions: Born to Kill was a rival gang to the Flying Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: David Thai later built his own gang that rivalled the Flying Dragons, called Born to Kill

descriptions: SGDs feuded with Latin Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Specifically due to constant feuding with local area gangs such as the ... Latin Dragons

descriptions: Nazi Lowriders has a rigid alliance with SoCal Skins.
edges.evidence_quote: Many of these Peckerwood gangs in California are subservient to the authority of Nazi Lowriders, which includes the punk gangs Vicious Circle and La Mirada Punks, as well as Insane White Boys, Independent Skins, Orange County Skins, and a rigid alliance with Southern California Skinhead Alliance (SoCal Skins).

descriptions: Mekameleen TV is run by exiled Brotherhood supporters and supports the Brotherhood.
edges.evidence_quote: Mekameleen TV, a Turkey-based free-to-air satellite television channel run by exiled Brotherhood supporters, mourned his death and claimed it was 'martyrdom'. Mekameleen supports the Brotherhood.

descriptions: los Anormales was a local gang that was part of La ONU.
edges.evidence_quote: La ONU was divided into local gangs such as Bin Laden Records, los Extranjeros, los Anormales, among others.

descriptions: Original Mexican Mafia is a splinter faction from the original Mexican Mafia after a split in 1978.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1978 the Mexican Mafia split into two organizations. One kept the original philosophy and structure and currently refer to themselves as the Original Mexican Mafia, 'Califas Faction', 'EME'.

descriptions: M-19 listed Tupamaros as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tupamaros

descriptions: M-19 was inspired by Tupamaros.
edges.evidence_quote: It was inspired by other South American urban guerrilla groups, such as the Tupamaros in Uruguay and the Montoneros in Argentina.

descriptions: The Modeo feud involved the most important clans of the Taranto area, including Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.evidence_quote: Questa faida coinvolse i clan più importanti del tarantino

descriptions: Bōsōzoku have ties to yakuza organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Alongside that, they have been shown to have ties to various yakuza organizations.

descriptions: Eastman Gang had rivalries with Yakey Yakes.
edges.evidence_quote: Eventually, the gang became involved in rivalries with other local gangs such as the Yakey Yakes and the Five Points Gang , warring over both territory and work as political sluggers for Tammany Hall.

descriptions: Allied gang listed in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Yakey Yakes

Byrd Gang.description: Criminal organization based in New Orleans, Louisiana, originating from the Magnolia Projects. Active since 2006, known for drug trafficking, murder, and violence. Described by police as one of the most murderous gangs in the city. Members have been indicted on federal RICO charges.

descriptions: 3-N-G clashed with Byrd Gang in 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2009 the gang clashed with the Byrd Gang at a Mardi Gras Parade which left seven people wounded by bullets.

descriptions: Byrd Gang is listed as a rival of 39ers gang in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Byrd Gang

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with 3NG according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang has feuded and clashed with 3-N-G gang, including a shooting at Mardi Gras parade.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has feuded with the 3-N-G gang for years, clashing with them during the 2009 Mardi Gras parade where seven people were shot, including a baby.

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with 39ers according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with AHM according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with BTY according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with Fischer Projects according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang is allied with Gerttown Hounds according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: 39ers , BTY, AHM, Gerttown Hounds. Fischer Projects, 3NG

descriptions: Byrd Gang has Ghost Gang as a rival according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: Byrd Gang has Goonie Gang as a rival according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: Byrd Gang has St Bernard Projects as a rival according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: Byrd Gang has Young Melph Mafia as a rival according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghost Gang Goonie Gang, Young Melph Mafia St Bernard Projects

descriptions: The Giorgi are allied with the Barbari.
edges.evidence_quote: e quelli detti Barbari

descriptions: The Rodà have branches in Lavagna with allied families Nucera and Casile.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno diramazioni in Liguria nella Locale di Lavagna con le famiglie alleate Nucera e Casile.

'Ndrina Paviglianiti.description: The Paviglianiti are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Lorenzo, Bagaladi, and Condofuri, Calabria. Historically led by Domenico Paviglianiti, dubbed the 'boss of bosses' by the press. They were allied with the De Stefano clan during the Second 'Ndrangheta war. Recent operations have targeted them for drug trafficking, extortion, corruption, and infiltration of public contracts.

descriptions: Anello and Paviglianiti were targeted together in Operation Via col vento, indicating a relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Barreca was allied with Paviglianiti in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: insieme ai Libri, i Tegano, i Latella, i Paviglianiti e gli Zito-Bertuca

descriptions: Bellocco and Paviglianiti were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: Operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè , Avignone e Paviglianiti .

descriptions: Mancuso, Paviglianiti, Anello, and Trapasso were targeted together in operation Via col vento, indicating cooperation in infiltrating wind farm contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Via col vento" ... presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: The Molè, Paviglianiti, and others were targeted together in an operation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco , Piromalli , Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti .

descriptions: Morabito is connected to the Paviglianiti 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Investigations revealed connections with Calabria... connected to the Paviglianiti 'ndrina of San Lorenzo as well as the Morabito 'ndrina.

descriptions: Morabito and Paviglianiti are linked through contiguity in Val d'Ossola drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra gli arrestati figura Russo Giovanni Rosario ... ritenuto contiguo a soggetti appartenenti alla 'ndrangheta insediatisi in Val d'Ossola, vicini alla famiglia Paviglianiti di San Lorenzo (RC), nonché ai Morabito di Africo (RC).

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were co-conspirators in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Paviglianiti and Iamonte were favored together in corruption schemes.
edges.evidence_quote: favorendo le 'ndrine degli Iamonte e dei Paviglianiti

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were co-conspirators in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Paviglianiti and Morabito are described as close in drug trafficking context.
edges.evidence_quote: vicini alla famiglia Paviglianiti di San Lorenzo, nonché ai Morabito di Africo

descriptions: Paviglianiti and Serraino were targeted together in operation Perfido, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Perfido contro i Serraino, gli Iamonte e i Paviglianiti

descriptions: Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello and Trapasso were co-conspirators in wind farm infiltration.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone presunte sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti, Mancuso, Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: Paviglianiti allied with De Stefano during the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Durante la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta erano a fianco dei De Stefano.

descriptions: Piromalli, Avignone, and Paviglianiti were jointly targeted in operation Gerry.
edges.evidence_quote: 23 marzo 2017: operazione Gerry contro le cosche Bellocco, Piromalli, Molè, Avignone e Paviglianiti

descriptions: Serraino, Paviglianiti, and Iamonte were members of the same 'locale' in Val di Cembra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il Locale sarebbe composto da membri dei Serraino, Paviglianiti e Iamonte .

descriptions: The Paviglianiti clan allied with the De Stefano clan during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: per i De Stefano capeggiati ora da Orazio , fratello di Paolo ci sono i Libri , i Tegano , i Latella , i Barreca , i Paviglianiti e gli Zito.

descriptions: Trapasso and Paviglianiti are sodali (allied) in the same criminal operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 luglio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Via col vento che porta all'arresto di 13 persone sodali delle 'ndrine Paviglianiti , Mancuso , Anello e Trapasso

descriptions: The Limelli clan joined the Nuvoletta-Gallo-Gionta confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: si aggregheranno sotto questa confederazione anche i limelli

descriptions: Three Brotherhood Alliance lists Mandalay-PDF as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Non-state allies ... Mandalay-PDF

descriptions: Tren del Llano displaced Los Caraqueños from Sucre, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Para mediados del 2020, el grupo expandió sus actividades al estado de Sucre, desplazando a una célula criminal llamada "Los Caraqueños" ligada al Tren de Aragua.

'Ndrina Agresta.description: The Agresta are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta from Platì, Calabria, active since at least the 1920s. They are also active in Piedmont, particularly in Volpiano, since the 1970s in collaboration with the Marando and Trimboli clans. Involved in drug trafficking, illegal gambling, and money laundering, they have been targeted in several police operations including Minotauro and Cerbero.

descriptions: Agresta is a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Agresta sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Agresta obtains drugs from Assisi in Brazil.
edges.evidence_quote: approvvigionandosi in Brasile dagli Assisi

descriptions: Agresta and Barbaro are both involved in the Cerbero operation.
edges.evidence_quote: delle 'ndrine dei Barbaro , degli Agresta, Assisi e Catanzariti

descriptions: Agresta and Catanzariti are both involved in the Cerbero operation.
edges.evidence_quote: delle 'ndrine dei Barbaro , degli Agresta, Assisi e Catanzariti

descriptions: Agresta and Giorgi are both targeted in the Platinum-Dia operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Platinum-Dia contro gli Agresta e i Giorgi

descriptions: Agresta collaborates with Marando in Piedmont since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i Marando e i Trimboli

descriptions: Agresta collaborates with Trimboli in Piedmont since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: in collaborazione con i Marando e i Trimboli

descriptions: Barbaro encompassed Agresta as a branch.
edges.evidence_quote: it began as a branch of the powerful Barbaro 'ndrina , which during that period also encompassed the Papalia , Agresta, Trimboli , Perre, Sergi 'ndrine , among others.

descriptions: The Agresta were historically part of the Barbaro group.
edges.evidence_quote: Ai tempi i Barbaro comprendevano anche le 'ndrine dei Perre , Trimboli , Agresta , Catanzariti , Sergi , Papalia , Molluso e Musitano .

descriptions: The Giorgi and Agresta were targeted together in an operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Platinum-Dia contro gli Agresta e i Giorgi

descriptions: Trimboli is allied with Agresta in Volpiano.
edges.evidence_quote: they are allied with the Marando and Agresta 'ndrine

descriptions: Trimboli are allied with Agresta in Volpiano since the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Si trovano fin dagli anni '70 nel comune di Volpiano , in provincia di Torino , con cui sono alleati dei Marando e degli Agresta

edges.target: Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme
descriptions: ANCDH signed an agreement to halt hostilities among themselves, which includes M23 as a party to the ceasefire.
edges.evidence_quote: On 9 May, various armed factions—including ... the Alliance Nationale des Congolais pour la Défense des Droits de l'Homme (ANCDH)—signed an agreement in Pinga, Walikale Territory, pledging to halt hostilities among themselves and align with the Congolese army.

Ah Kong.description: Ah Kong was a Singapore-originated organized crime and drug syndicate that controlled the European heroin trade from the 1970s to the 1990s. Based in Amsterdam and Bangkok, it was one of the world's largest drug syndicates, sourcing heroin from the Golden Triangle. The gang was founded by Singaporean Chinese members who fled to the Netherlands after a gang clash. It declined after its boss was assassinated in 1997 and the last official boss died in 2010.

descriptions: Ah Kong is a rival of 14K per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ah Kong , Big Circle Gang , Sun Yee On , Wo On Lok , Wo Shing Wo

descriptions: Infobox lists 14K as rival of Ah Kong.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K

descriptions: Ah Kong clashed with and defeated 14K after a disrespect incident.
edges.evidence_quote: There was an occasion when Siam-kia was disrespected by the 14K boss known as Ngau Si. A clash between the two gangs erupted. Ah Kong defeated 14K

descriptions: 14K is listed as a rival of Ah Kong in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 14K

descriptions: Ah Kong under Dennis had business dealings with the Italian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: He had business dealings with the Italian mafia and Yugoslavian crime syndicate

descriptions: After splitting from Ah Kong, Johnny founded the Hainan gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Johnny went to Bangkok and established the Hainan gang.

descriptions: Ah Kong was founded by former See Tong members and initially operated under See Tong flag.
edges.evidence_quote: Roland Tan and his brethren... founded Ah Kong but operated under the See Tong flag.

descriptions: Sin Ma gang replaced Ah Kong's influence after 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: After the assassination of the Ah Kong boss in 1997, they began to lose their influence to the Sin Ma gang

descriptions: Sin Ma leader Cha Boh Hai was suspected of ordering the hit on Ah Kong leader Dennis.
edges.evidence_quote: some people from the inner-circle discredited his claim and some said that the leader of the Sin Ma gang - Cha Boh Hai, was the one behind the hit.

descriptions: Ah Kong built strong ties with Sio Sam Ong.
edges.evidence_quote: over the years they had built strong ties with the infamous Penang -based Sio Sam Ong

descriptions: Ah Kong members had a dispute with Wo Shing Wo, resulting in violence.
edges.evidence_quote: two members of Ah Kong... went to settle a dispute with the Wo Shing Wo triad in Rotterdam

descriptions: Ah Kong under Dennis had business dealings with the Yugoslavian crime syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: He had business dealings with the Italian mafia and Yugoslavian crime syndicate

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo battled Ah Kong in Amsterdam in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: the group battled the 14K and Ah Kong for control of the heroin trade in Amsterdam

descriptions: Al-Nusra opposed Liwa Al-Quds.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Liwa Al-Quds

Khánh Trắng.description: Khánh Trắng was a Vietnamese crime boss who operated in Hanoi during the late 1990s, using his position as President of the Dong Xuan Labor Union as a front for extortion, murder, and tax evasion. He controlled the Dong Xuan market area and led a gang of about three dozen criminals. He was executed by firing squad in 1998.

descriptions: Khanh's organization forced Hung Cuba's group to submit by blocking routes, then merged the two organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Khanh attempted to negotiate with Hung Cuba for control over these areas, but the two didn't come to an agreement. In response, Khanh had his men block all of the routes to the bus station and Long Bien market. Unable to transport or receive any of his goods from shippers, Hung Cuba was forced to submit to Khanh's will.

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with La 12, the barra brava of Boca Juniors.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of Boca Juniors (La 12)

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with La Gloriosa, the barra brava of San Lorenzo de Almagro.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of ... San Lorenzo de Almagro (La Gloriosa)

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had fights with La Guardia Imperial, the barra brava of Racing de Avellaneda.
edges.evidence_quote: the barra brava has had several fights and altercations with the Argentine police and with other barras bravas, especially with that of Racing de Avellaneda (La Guardia Imperial), Independiente's main football rival

descriptions: La Barra Del Rojo has had major confrontations with Los Borrachos del Tablón, the barra brava of River Plate.
edges.evidence_quote: it also had major confrontations with the barras bravas of ... River Plate (Los Borrachos del Tablón)

descriptions: Los Polacos is a sub-group within La Barra Del Rojo.
edges.evidence_quote: The most important are: ... Los Polacos ... all of them come from the most dangerous villas miserias and poor neighborhoods

'Ndrina Vadalà.description: The Vadalà are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Bova Marina, Reggio Calabria, Italy. They are involved in international drug trafficking, extortion, and have alleged interests in Slovakia. The clan has been implicated in public works corruption and is linked to the murder of Slovak journalist Ján Kuciak.

descriptions: Morabito and Vadalà were arrested together in the Bellu Lavuru 2 operation, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, Bruzzaniti, Talia, Vadalà, Rodà, and Maisano were all involved in conditioning public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Rodà were arrested alongside the Vadalà clan in the same operation, indicating cooperation in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Talia and Vadalà clans are mentioned together as part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara -Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: Talia and Vadalà cooperated in influencing public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano; secondo le indagini i clan avrebbero fortemente condizionato gli appalti pubblici

descriptions: Antonio Vadalà was intercepted with the capo of the Libri-Zindato 'ndrina, indicating a meeting between the two organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2001 Antonio Vadalà viene intercettato con il capo-'ndrina Francesco Zindato dei Libri - Zindato

descriptions: The Vadalà and Rodà clans were both arrested in the same operation, indicating they were part of a criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Vadalà and Talia clans were both arrested in the same operation, indicating they were part of a criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Vadalà 'ndrina has direct contacts with a Colombian cartel for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero attivi nel traffico internazionale di droga e avrebbero contatti diretti con un cartello colombiano

descriptions: The Vadalà clan was arrested alongside the Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti clan in the same operation, indicating they were part of a criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Vadalà and Maisano clans were both arrested in the same operation, indicating they were part of a criminal association.
edges.evidence_quote: Vengono arrestati diversi affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito - Palamara - Bruzzaniti , dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Turkmen Abdulhamid Han Brigade has ties to the Grey Wolves.
edges.evidence_quote: Some Syrian rebel groups have ties to the Grey Wolves. One is the Muntasir Billah Brigade, another is the Turkmen Abdulhamid Han Brigade.
